top_signals.title: FanDuel Owner Plans to Delist From London After Shift to US
top_signals.summary: Flutter Entertainment Plc announced plans to delist from the London Stock Exchange about two years after the online betting group shifted its primary listing to New York, the latest company to abandon the UK bourse to prioritize US trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Italian Financial Stocks Soar as Paschi Bids Revive Deal Chatter
top_signals.summary: Italian banks and insurers sprang into life this week as a potential bidding battle for Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA triggered broad gains across the country’s financial stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Flutter to ditch secondary London listing as it severs ties with UK market
top_signals.summary: Sports betting company cites high costs and low trading levels in its decision
